title: Lennox Announces Agreement to Sell European Commercial HVAC and Refrigeration Businesses
text: DALLAS , Sept. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient climate-control solutions, announces it has entered into an agreement to sell its European commercial HVAC and refrigeration businesses, headquartered in Lyon, France, to funds managed by Syntagma Capital.
